prompt: A vibrant celebratory party poster-style illustration set inside a packed nightclub or event venue, viewed from behind a central person in a light beige or white hoodie and dark jeans, standing in the foreground with one arm raised triumphantly toward the stage. The scene is filled with colorful confetti, curled streamers, balloons, neon signs, and warm marquee lights, with a festive purple, pink, blue, and gold color palette. At the center top, a large glowing marquee sign with a black background and round incandescent bulbs reads “Hosted by” in warm golden script above huge neon letters reading “GPT 5.5,” with “GPT” in electric blue and “5.5” in bright pink-purple. Around the venue are exactly 6 visible text elements besides the main marquee: a tall vertical banner on the left reading “5/5 LET’S CELEBRATE,” a digital clock-like sign in the upper right reading “5:55 PM” with a small party hat icon, a circular neon sign on the right reading “5/5,” a large purple balloon on the lower right reading “LET’S PARTY!,” a framed checklist sign on a small round table at lower left reading “TODAY’S PLAN:” followed by 5 checked lines — “GOOD VIBES,” “GREAT PEOPLE,” “AWESOME MUSIC,” “UNLIMITED FUN,” and “POWERED BY GPT 5.5” with a small heart — and a gift box at lower right labeled “THANK YOU” on top and “FOR BEING PART OF THE FUTURE” on the side. Include a cheering crowd with many raised hands and silhouettes facing a stage with purple-blue concert lighting beams. Add exactly 7 prominent balloon elements: a cluster of 4 balloons on the left in gold, purple, red, and teal; 2 balloons on the lower right in teal and gold; and 1 large purple text balloon on the right. Include a disco ball in the upper right corner, a person on the left wearing a dark cap and dark T-shirt with a glowing robot logo and the text “GPT 5.5” on the back, and a matching branded takeaway cup on the table. The atmosphere should feel like an energetic tech-company celebration or product launch party, cinematic, glossy, highly detailed, whimsical, and polished, with dramatic backlighting, glowing reflections, saturated neon, and a sense of motion from the falling confetti and dancing crowd.
